mapper.select: SELECT id,user_name as name, role, created_at as createdAt FROM users
SELECT id, user_name, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT user_name as userName, password ,role FROM users WHERE user_name = #{name}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (user_name, password, role, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{password}, #{role}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET user_name = #{name}, password = #{password}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
